<!-- Pokemon sprite symbols (add to <defs> section) -->
    <!-- Pikachu sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-pikachu" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Charizard sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-charizard" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Mewtwo sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-mewtwo" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Gengar sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-gengar" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Gyarados sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-gyarados" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Snorlax sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-snorlax" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Blastoise sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-blastoise" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Dragonite sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-dragonite" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Alakazam sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-alakazam" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Machamp sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-machamp" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Lapras sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-lapras" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>
    <!-- Venusaur sprite -->
    <symbol id="sprite-venusaur" viewBox="0 0 96 96">
      <image href="data:image/png;base64," x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96"/>
    </symbol>

<!-- Team 1 row (replace in Species Revealed) -->
      <g transform="translate(25, 85)">
        <text x="0" y="22" class="label-text agent1">T₁:</text>
        <use href="#sprite-pikachu" x="40" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-charizard" x="82" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-mewtwo" x="124" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-gengar" x="166" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-gyarados" x="208" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-snorlax" x="250" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
      </g>

<!-- Team 2 row (replace in Species Revealed) -->
      <g transform="translate(25, 135)">
        <text x="0" y="22" class="label-text agent2">T₂:</text>
        <use href="#sprite-blastoise" x="40" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-dragonite" x="82" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-alakazam" x="124" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-machamp" x="166" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-lapras" x="208" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
        <use href="#sprite-venusaur" x="250" y="-5" width="40" height="40"/>
      </g>
